message.content:
@startuml
'!option handwritten true

title 系统用户登录时序图

actor Client
participant API
participant MsgServer

Client -> API: 1 login
activate API
API -> API: 2 account verify
deactivate API

alt [verify success:]
  API -> Client: 3 generate jwt and return
  Client -> MsgServer: 4 connect MsgServer and build tcp connect
  activate MsgServer
  MsgServer -> MsgServer: 5 parse jwt and attr the accountInfo to Channel
  deactivate MsgServer
  MsgServer -> Client: 6 connect success
else [verify fail:]
  API -> Client: 7 login failed;
end

@enduml
